project.name: fpga_awp_template
project.description: FPGA Agent Workspace Protocol v0.1 模板仓库

target_use_cases: AXI / AXI-Lite / AXI-Stream data path development

platforms.description: ZCU102 — Zynq UltraScale+ MPSoC (xczu9eg-ffvb1156-2-e). 100 MHz, 备选平台.
AX7010 — Zynq-7000 (xc7z010clg400-1). 50 MHz, ILA 时钟 FCLK_CLK0, 主力平台.

directories.rtl: RTL 设计源码（Verilog / SystemVerilog）[L2: FPGA-Method]
directories.sim: 仿真脚本和仿真输出 [L2: FPGA-Method]
directories.vivado: Vivado 工程相关文件（.xpr, .tcl 等）[L2: FPGA-Method]
directories.board: 上板验证记录和脚本 [L2: FPGA-Method]
directories..awp: AWP-Core 工程治理协议数据库 [L1]
directories..awp/platform: 硬件基座清单 [L2: FPGA-Method, 跨层]
directories..claude/agents: Agent 角色定义 [L1/L2/L3 混合, 见 LAYERS.md]
directories..claude/skills/: 可复用技能（awp-* = L1 治理, fpga-* = L2 领域）[L1+L2]

validation_levels.L0: static review — 代码审查、lint、CDC 审查
validation_levels.L1a: 模块级单元仿真 — 单模块，单帧/单事务
validation_levels.L1b: 数据通路闭环仿真 — ≥2 个数据通路模块串联，含跨帧测试
validation_levels.L1c: 全系统集成仿真 — 完整系统，所有接口，多帧/多事务
validation_levels.L3: implementation and timing — 实现与时序收敛
validation_levels.L5: board smoke test — 板上冒烟测试（上电、JTAG 检测、基本 I/O）
validation_levels.L6: board data correctness test — 板上数据正确性测试
validation_levels.L7: performance / resource retrospective — 性能与资源复盘
